title: Vendidad: The Law Against Demons
description: The Zoroastrian law code on purity, pollution, and the battle against evil — the most detailed ritual text in the Avesta.
introduction: The Zoroastrian law code on purity, pollution, and the battle against evil — the most detailed ritual text in the Avesta.

translation.text: Ahura Mazda said to Spitama Zarathustra: I have created lands of delight. But against every one of them, Angra Mainyu created a counter-evil.
